atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Use the `@tailwind` directive to insert Tailwind's `base`, `components`, `utilities` and `screens` styles into your CSS.

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: The `@theme` directive lets you define design tokens for Tailwind CSS.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: The `@config` directive is used to point Tailwind to a config file.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: The `@source` directive tells Tailwind where to find the source files.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: The `@custom-variant` directive allows adding custom variants.
